title: 🚀 Speed, Performance & Rock-Solid Stability! ✨
message: We've heavily optimized under-the-hood engine operations, crushing minor bugs and boosting performance across the entire application for an ultra-snappy experience.
points: 🏎️ Blazing Fast Execution: Re-engineered background processes and data loading pipelines to significantly accelerate app responsiveness and reduce interface latency.
🛡️ Stability Overhaul: Swept through deep layout layers to fix minor bugs and ensure seamless, crash-free operational workflows.

title: 🚀 Stunning Universal Animations & Security! ✨
message: We've completely overhauled the visual experience with premium fluid animations across all screens and sheets, alongside an ultra-secure ad verification shield.
points: 🎨 Fluid Universal Animations: Every card, folder, text header, and dialog layout now glides into perspective with a premium staggered entry sequence.
⏳ Zero-Flash Tab Switching: Smart load flag listeners ensure layout cards only run their animations once during active tab changes, completely eliminating double-load flashes.
⚙️ Database & UI Polish: Refined input dialog palettes using unbounded wrap layouts to prevent layout crashes, backed by minor optimization tuning.

title: 🚀 New Daily Progress Monitor! ✨
message: We've added a highly requested tracking fraction monitor right on your home dashboard to help you clear out all your habits every day with absolute confidence.
points: 📊 Live Tracking Count: Get an accurate 1/5 active status check on your daily layout to see exactly how much you've completed at a glance.
🎨 Glowing Card Borders: Tracker cards now dynamic highlight their premium boundaries the moment you increment them past zero.
🎯 UI Polish: Enhanced spatial layout rules above your main card grid to ensure fluid scrolling across all responsive mobile device screens.
⚙️ Enhanced Performance: Fine-tuned local calculation algorithms for an ultra-fast, zero-delay dashboard experience.

title: ✨ The Update Hub is Here! 🚀
message: We've crafted a beautiful new way to keep you perfectly in sync with our latest productivity tools and features.
points: 🔔 New In-App Updater: Get instantly notified about fresh features directly from your home screen.
📖 Interactive Changelogs: Discover exactly what's new the moment you update your app.
🔄 Manual Check: Instantly check for new updates anytime with the dashboard status icon.
⚡ Performance Boost: Under-the-hood tweaks for an even smoother, distraction-free experience.
